title: Anchorage Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Anchorage with a Z-Score of -3.63. The city is experiencing extremely low temperatures.
body:
The current cold snap in Anchorage has reached a critical level, with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 13.7 GG, indicating a high demand for heating. 
 The humidity is at 80% and the wind speed is 12.0 km/h, making the conditions even more severe.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the effects of the cold snap.
